channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Iran–US technical-level talks scheduled in Switzerland, FO confirms follow-up to Islamabad MoU
item.description: The Foreign Office (FO) of Pakistan has announced that technical-level talks between the United States and Iran are scheduled to take place in Buergenstock, Switzerland, on Sunday. These discussions a...

item.title: Deepfake Doctors Exploit Healthcare Gaps and Public Distrust in Kenya
item.description: This opinion and analysis article examines the growing use of AI-generated deepfake doctors on social media platforms in Kenya and how they are being used to spread health misinformation and sell ques...

item.title: Maruti Suzuki Ertiga Facelift Expected by 2027 With Design Updates, New Features, and Underbody CNG Option
item.description: MotorOctane reports that Maruti Suzuki is preparing a facelifted version of the Ertiga MPV, one of India's best-selling seven-seater family vehicles. Although the Ertiga remains popular among families...

item.title: Fact-Check Finds Viral Trump Quote About Arresting Ruto at G7 Summit Was Fabricated
item.description: A fact-check by Africa Check has found that a widely shared social media claim alleging that US President Donald Trump threatened Kenyan President William Ruto with arrest during the 2026 G7 Summit is...

item.title: Public Reactions Highlight Ongoing Distrust of the 'Bail is Free' Principle in Nigeria
item.description: This photo-based report looks at public reactions to the long-standing legal principle that bail should be granted without payment in Nigeria. Despite repeated awareness campaigns and official stateme...

item.title: Journalist Alisa Valdes-Rodriguez Says Family Citizenship Dispute Delayed Her Planned Departure from the United States
item.description: Raw Story reported on statements made by journalist Alisa Valdes-Rodriguez, who is known for her reporting on Jeffrey Epstein and alleged intelligence-community connections. According to the article, ...

item.title: JD Vance Faces Criticism After Claim That Strait of Hormuz Was Open Is Contradicted by Iran's Subsequent Closure
item.description: Vice President JD Vance became the target of widespread criticism on social media after comments he made regarding negotiations with Iran appeared to be contradicted by subsequent events. During an ap...

item.title: DHS World Cup social media post sparks controversy and undermines Trump immigration narrative, analysis says
item.description: An analysis published by journalist Alexander Willis reports that a recent social media post from the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) has created controversy during the early stages of the ...

item.title: Trump criticized after Truth Social poll on how to spell insult toward Democrats
item.description: Former President Donald Trump drew widespread online criticism and ridicule after posting a poll on his Truth Social platform asking followers to choose between two spellings of a derogatory term aime...

item.title: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent Reportedly Compared Donald Trump and George Soros in New Book
item.description: A report highlighted by The Guardian and drawn from the book 'Regime Change' reveals that U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent privately compared President Donald Trump to billionaire investor and De...

item.title: Book Claims Melania Trump Opposed White House Renovation Plans but Failed to Stop Major Changes
item.description: A discussion on The Daily Beast Podcast highlighted claims from the book 'Regime Change,' written by journalists Maggie Haberman and Jonathan Swan, regarding tensions between First Lady Melania Trump ...

item.title: Alleged ₹979-crore corruption case linked to Jal Jeevan Mission contracts in Rajasthan
item.description: The Rajasthan Anti-Corruption Bureau (ACB) has filed a massive 17,500-page chargesheet in a major corruption investigation involving the Jal Jeevan Mission (JJM), a central government scheme aimed at ...

item.title: Trump Adviser Alex Bruesewitz Accuses Mark Levin of Undermining Administration’s Iran Peace Deal
item.description: A public dispute erupted within pro-Trump circles after Trump adviser Alex Bruesewitz sharply criticized Fox News host Mark Levin over Levin’s opposition to a tentative peace agreement between the Tru...

item.title: Italian Conservative Newspaper Criticizes Trump After Dispute With Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni
item.description: A conservative Italian newspaper, Libero Quotidiano, published a strongly worded opinion article criticizing U.S. President Donald Trump following a public disagreement involving Italian Prime Ministe...

item.title: DOJ Declines to Submit Court-Ordered Declaration on Suspended Anti-Weaponization Fund
item.description: A dispute has emerged between the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) and a federal judge over the future of a proposed $1.776 billion anti-weaponization fund. According to the report, U.S. District Judg...

item.title: 98-Year-Old Ekiti Voter Recalls How Awolowo Inspired His Lifelong Commitment to Politics and Democracy
item.description: Pa Joseph Adu, a 98-year-old farmer from Iyin-Ekiti in Irepodun/Ifelodun Local Government Area of Ekiti State, said that the late Chief Obafemi Awolowo played a major role in shaping his interest and ...

item.title: Opinion column argues converging political and economic pressures could lead to Trump resignation
item.description: The article is an opinion column that argues, in speculative terms, that a combination of political, economic, and internal party pressures could potentially lead to President Donald Trump resigning. ...

item.title: Trump Polls Supporters on Preferred Democratic Nickname as Iran-U.S. Agreement Faces New Setback
item.description: President Donald Trump used his Truth Social platform on Saturday to ask supporters for input on a nickname he should use for Democrats, presenting a poll that compared the terms 'Dumocrat' and 'Dumbo...

item.title: Political commentator Keith Edwards says FBI agents visited his home after social media posts about the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool project
item.description: Political commentator Keith Edwards stated that FBI agents visited his home after he posted messages on social media regarding the controversial restoration of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool in ...

item.title: Anti-Terrorism Court sentences PTI leaders Yasmin Rashid and others to 10 years in May 9 police vehicles arson case, Shah Mahmood Qureshi acquitted
item.description: In a significant development from Lahore, an Anti-Terrorism Court has convicted several senior leaders of Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf including Dr Yasmin Rashid, Omar Sarfraz Cheema, Mahmood ur Rashid an...
